units.name: produce_tasks
units.instructions: Turn the goal into a concrete ordered task list. Use [TASKS_READY] when ready to execute, [CONTINUE] to keep refining, [ASK_USER] for clarification, [FAIL] if you cannot proceed.

units.name: execute_tasks
units.instructions: Execute the tasks in order. Use [DONE] when all tasks are complete, [CONTINUE] to keep working, [ASK_USER] for clarification, [FAIL] on unrecoverable failure.
